name: DMG Mori Co., Ltd.
summary: DMG Mori Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells machine tools worldwide. It offers 5-axis/multi-axis machines, turning centers, machining centers, and Lasertec and ultrasonic machines, as well as handling, shaping, measuring, and monitoring technology cycles. The company also provides pallet pool, workpiece handling, pallet handling, and tool handling systems; tool pre-setting, shrinking, measuring, and balancing devices; and CELOS, an operating system for machine tools, as well as CELOS software. In addition, it offers peripherals, such as coolant oil, oil skimmer, compressor, coolant filtration, air dryer, and coolant nozzle machines; measuring devices, including tool presetter, shrink fit and balancing machines, and on-machine measurement devices; bar feeder machines; and electrical cabinet coolers. The company was formerly known as DMG Mori Seiki Co., Ltd. and changed its name to DMG Mori Co., Ltd. in 2015. DMG Mori Co., Ltd. was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
